defaults.negative_prompt: modern objects, cars, power lines, plastic, text, watermark, blurry, distorted, deformed hands, extra limbs

ideas.title: How is life in Egypt at 1500 BC

scenes.prompt: Sunrise over the Nile in ancient Egypt, 1500 BC. Farmers in white linen kilts walk to the fields carrying bronze tools, mist on the water, date palms along the bank.
Workers harvesting golden wheat with bronze sickles under a blazing sun, chaff drifting in the air, an overseer watching nearby.
An Egyptian woman in patterned linen walks through a busy sunlit marketplace beside stone temple columns, people trading and walking under parasols in the background.
Sunset over the river, reed fishing boats drifting past tall limestone temple pylons and obelisks, sky glowing orange.
